name: Linguini with Paprika Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dry white wine (or white vinegar)
or 3/4 cup Well drained Italian plum tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a heavy 10-inch skillet over low heat.
2. Add the garlic and cook until golden brown, about 10 minutes. Remove the garlic with a slotted spoon.
3. Add the paprika to the skillet and stir for 5 minutes.
4. Add the wine. Increase the heat and bring to a boil. Reduce by half.
5. Finely chop the tomatoes in a processor or blender. Stir them into the skillet.
6. Add the salt. Simmer until the sauce thickens, about 10 minutes.
7. Cook the linguini as desired.
8. Top with cheese if desired.
